name: Sweet Sunshine Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 cups black beans (cooked, rinsed, and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions for the minimum cooking time.
2. Place peas and carrots in a colander. When pasta is done, pour into the colander over peas and carrots. The hot water will cool the vegetables slightly.
3. Drain and place in a large bowl. Add pineapple, beans, bell pepper, onions, and orange sections. Toss to combine.
4. Combine 1/2 cup of pineapple juice and remaining ingredients. Mix well.
5. Pour over pasta mixture. Mix gently until well combined.
6. Chill thoroughly, preferably overnight. Mix several times while chilling.
